body:
# Description

Create schema validator script.

# [PKT-FND-007](task-0028): Schema Validator Script

## Purpose

Create the schema validator script.

## Scope

- Schema validation
- Fixture testing
- Error reporting

## Implementation

1. Define validation logic
2. Implement fixture testing
3. Add error reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Validator checks all schemas
2. Fixtures tested correctly
3. Errors reported clearly
